_comment: Optional metadata overrides, keyed by path under reports/. Any file works WITHOUT an entry here (it falls back to <title>, folder name, and <meta name='report:*'> tags). Add an entry to control summary/date/featured/emoji/accent, or to group bilingual reports into one card via a shared 'group' key.

crypto/比特币熊市低点联合推演报告.html.summary: 基于「盈利地址百分比 × RHODL 比值 × 历史高点回撤」三项链上指标 5,800+ 日全周期数据，构建四模型交叉验证框架，推演本轮熊市底部的时间窗口与价格区间。

crypto/Bitcoin_Cycle_Bottom_Projection_E.summary: A four-model cross-validation framework built on 5,800+ days of full-cycle on-chain data — projecting the timing window and price range of this cycle's bottom.
